products.name: Volvo teases a new affordable EV to replace discontinued EX30
products.summary: Volvo's compact, quirky EX30 had a lot of problems when it was first released. Tariffs essentially erased its affordability, making it more expensive to own, and a battery recall made it dangerous to park indoors. But its discontinuation didn't spell the end o

products.name: PlayStation exclusives aren’t coming to PC anymore
products.summary: Sony reportedly won't release its major single-player PlayStation games on PC anymore. According to Bloomberg's Jason Schreier, Hermen Hulst, who heads up PlayStation's studios business, informed employees in a town hall on Monday about the change in strategy.

products.name: Walmart launches new budget-friendly Android tablets starting at $97

products.name: Sony is raising short-subscription prices for PlayStation Plus

products.name: Amazon Alexa Plus can now create AI-generated podcasts

products.name: OSHA probing worker death at SpaceX’s Starbase site
products.summary: The death is the latest worker safety issue at the Starbase facility, which has a higher injury rate than all other SpaceX sites.
